apps.description:
KVeo is an innovative AI-powered video generation app that transforms text prompts into stunning videos. Using advanced AI technology, users can create custom videos by simply describing what they want to see. The app features a sleek, neumorphic design that provides an intuitive and modern user experience on iOS devices.

Key Features

AI Video Generation: 
 - Create videos from text descriptions/prompts
 - Support for both landscape (16:9) and portrait (9:16) aspect ratios
 - Customizable video duration (5-8 seconds)
 - Real-time video preview
 - High-quality AI-generated output

Video Management
 - Save generated videos to device's photo library
 - Built-in video history with preview capabilities
 - Share videos directly from the app
 - Copy and reuse successful prompts

User Interface
 - Modern neumorphic design language
 - Intuitive prompt input system
 - Video preview before saving
 - Easy-to-use aspect ratio selector
 - Duration control slider

Seconds Bundle System
 - The app operates on a "seconds" currency system for video generation:

Starter Balance
New users receive 10 free seconds upon installation

Available Bundles
 - 10 Seconds Pack 
 - 20 Seconds Pack
 - 50 Seconds Pack
 - 100 Seconds Pack

Bundle Features
 - Instant activation upon purchase
 
Usage System
 - Seconds are deducted based on video duration

Clear balance display
 - Automatic refund of seconds if generation fails
 - Purchase prompts when balance is insufficient

The seconds bundle system provides a flexible way for users to manage their video generation needs, with options suitable for both casual users and power users who need to generate multiple videos regularly.

apps.description:
Unleash your creativity with Image Style Transform, the ultimate AI-powered photo transformation app! Instantly convert your ordinary photos into breathtaking works of art using a variety of unique artistic styles. Whether you're a content creator, artist, or just want to have fun with your pictures, this app makes it effortless and magical.

Key Features:
AI Style Transformations
 - Instantly apply different artistic styles to any image using powerful AI prompts designed for high-quality results.
Diverse Style Options:
 - Choose from a rich collection of styles:
 - Cartoon – Fun and colorful cartoon renderings
 - Anime – Japanese anime-inspired transformations
 - Gibura -  Magical and nostalgic art like a Ghibli movie
 - 3D Cartoon – Lifelike 3D animation style, Pixar-inspired
 - Oil Painting – Classic, textured brush strokes of oil on canvas
 - Pencil Sketch – Hand-drawn black-and-white sketches with realistic shading
 - Watercolor – Soft and flowing watercolor art on textured paper
 - Comic Book – Bold outlines, halftone shading, and vivid comic flair
 - Manga – Monochrome Japanese comic art with clean lines and screen tones
 - Digital Painting – High-res fantasy-style artwork, like made in Photoshop or Procreate

Easy-to-Use Interface
- Just upload a photo, select a style, and let the AI work its magic—no sign-up or complex steps required!
Fast Processing
 - Get your styled images in seconds thanks to optimized image generation backend.

Share & Save
 - Easily download or share your stylized creations on social media or with friends.

• Auto-renewable subscription
• Your subscription will be charged to your iTunes account at confirmation of purchase and will automatically renew (at the duration selected) unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24 hours before the end of the current period.
• Current subscription may not be canceled during the active subscription period; however, you can manage your subscription and/or turn off auto-renewal by visiting your iTunes Account Settings after purchase

For support and suggestions reach at support@karmaacademy.com.au

apps.description:
Track expenses effortlessly. Xify is the best "expense tracker".

Easily manage your finances with "expense tracker" Xify. Scan receipts using your camera or add expenses manually. Track expenses across categories and keep everything organized with smart categorization.

With "expense tracker" Xify, you can track mileage, scan receipts, and monitor your spending instantly. This app is built for anyone needing smart expense management—whether it's business receipts, personal expenses, travel costs, or daily purchases.

Use "expense tracker" Xify to manage your budget offline, with no hidden fees or complicated steps. Your financial data stays secure and private.

Keep your expenses organized and track spending patterns with detailed analytics. Control your budget from the settings and customize categories at your own will.

Start using "expense tracker" Xify to simplify how you handle money and receipt management every day.

Extract text from receipts in one go with advanced OCR technology. Get perfect text recognition with "expense tracker" Xify smart scan feature. Once receipts are scanned, use the smart search to find specific expenses and navigate through your expense history effortlessly.

Things don't just finish here, with "expense tracker" Xify you can track mileage automatically, set budget limits, and get spending insights. The analytics will show your expense patterns and help you make better financial decisions.


Terms of Use: https://xify.karmaacademy.com.au/terms.html
Privacy Policy: https://xify.karmaacademy.com.au/privacy.html

Spectrum - Create stunning abstract wallpapers and backgrounds with this powerful mesh gradient editor. Design beautiful gradients with precise control over every aspect of your creation.

Key Features

Gradient Creation:
- Interactive mesh gradient editor with draggable control points
- Multiple gradient types: Mesh, Linear, Radial, and Conic gradients
- Adjustable mesh complexity (predefined sizes: 2x2, 3x3, 4x4, 5x5, and custom user-defined dimensions)
- Real-time color editing with an intuitive system color picker interface
- Multiple color interpolation methods (IDW, Bilinear, Nearest Neighbor, RBF, Linear RGB, Linear HSV) for smooth or distinct color transitions
- Undo functionality (up to 10 history states) for reverting changes
- Randomize gradient function for quick, serendipitous designs

Customization Options:
- Multiple aspect ratios: Square (1:1), Standard (4:3), Widescreen (16:9), and Phone Story (9:16) formats
- Precise color control (RGB) for each gradient point
- Template library with pre-designed gradient combinations (e.g., Sunset, Ocean, Neon, Forest, Cosmic, Fire, Ice, Aurora)
- Ability to reset to the current template's default state
- Quick action buttons for rapid editing workflow (e.g., add point, remove point, randomize)

Export Capabilities:
- High-resolution image export to Photos app
- Multiple resolution options: Small, Medium, and Large formats (dynamic, e.g., 1080x1080 up to 4096x4096 for square, and proportionally scaled for other ratios)
- Dynamic resolution scaling based on selected aspect ratio
- Gradient data export as JSON (includes points, mesh size, aspect ratio, interpolation method, gradient type, and export resolution) for sharing configurations
- Copy gradient settings (detailed text summary) to clipboard for easy transfer

User Experience:
- Minimizable controls interface for a distraction-free editing canvas
- Haptic feedback for key interactions (e.g., point selection, adding/removing points, template loading, undo, color changes)
- Toast notifications for non-intrusive feedback (e.g., export success, settings copied, errors)
- In-app tips for new users (Drag Point, Add Point, Tap Point)

Onboarding flow for first-time users
- Help section with guidance and information
- Favorites system to save and quickly access preferred gradients
- Ability to name and save custom mesh sizes

App & Support:
- Settings view for app-level configurations
- Contact support via native mail composer (if mail is configured) or copies support email to clipboard

Premium Features:
- Advanced export options and higher resolutions
- Extended template library access
- Additional customization tools and effects (e.g., specific color interpolation methods, Story aspect ratio, custom mesh sizes)
- Access to all gradient types and mesh complexities

Perfect for designers, artists, and anyone looking to create unique wallpapers and abstract backgrounds for their devices.

Privacy Policy: https://meshy.karmaacademy.com.au/privacypolicy/
Terms of use: https://meshy.karmaacademy.com.au/privacypolicy/

Turn images into PDFs instantly. Paperly is the best "PDF maker app".

Easily create PDF files from your images with "Image to PDF Converter" Paperly. Select photos from your gallery or scan paper documents using your camera. Combine them into a single PDF file and keep everything organized.

With "Image to PDF Converter" Paperly, you can save, share, or print your files instantly. This app is built for anyone needing fast image-to-PDF conversion-whether it's receipts, assignments, forms, or notes.

Use "Image to PDF Converter" Paperly to manage your files offline, with no watermarks or extra steps. 

Keep your documents clean and secure in PDF format. Manage the PDF quality from the settings at your own will. 

Start using "Image to PDF Converter" Paperly to simplify how you handle paper and image documents every day.

Extract text from the images in one go once you finish loading all of your images. Get the perfect text recognition with "Image to PDF Converter" Paperly. Once the text is scanned use the smart search feature that will highlight the searched word and also use the next and previous button to move between the searchs. Also the search will automatically scroll to the search words. 

Things don't just finish here, with "Image to PDF Converter" you can "chat with PDF" and ask questions about the PDF content. The chat will reply from the loaded images content.

Invoice Generator: InvoEase is your all-in-one solution for seamless invoice management. This user-friendly app empowers business owners to effortlessly create professional invoices, efficiently manage client information, organize line items with precision, and customize currency preferences to suit your business needs. 

With Invoice Generator: InvoEase generating and sending invoices in PDF format has never been more convenient. 
Simplify your billing process and elevate your business efficiency with Invoice Generator: InvoEase today!

FEATURES

apps.description:
LandlordCo: Rental Property Management Made Simple
LandlordCo is the ultimate property management app for landlords and real estate investors. Whether you manage one rental or a large portfolio, LandlordCo helps you streamline rent collection, track expenses, store lease agreements, and stay on top of your property finances—all in one powerful app.

 Key Features for Landlords:
• Property Management Dashboard:
Easily manage all your rental properties with a clean, centralized dashboard. Track performance, view net income, and monitor cash flow effortlessly.
• Rent Payment Tracker:
Track rental payments, set due date reminders, and manage rent collection for every unit. See who paid, who’s late, and how much is owed—instantly.

• Expense Management:
Log and categorize expenses with receipt capture. Filter by category, property, or date to monitor maintenance, repairs, and operating costs.

• Tenant Management:
Keep detailed records of each tenant including lease terms, move-in dates, payment history, and contact info—organized and accessible.

• Income & Financial Analytics:
Visualize rental income, operating expenses, and net profits with interactive charts and financial reporting tools. LandlordCo makes it easy to understand your property performance.

• Lease Document Storage:
Store lease agreements, receipts, and important documents securely within the app. No more digging through emails or folders.

• Multi-Property Support:
Manage multiple units or properties from one account. Toggle between properties and generate property-specific reports instantly.

 Why Landlords Love LandlordCo:
• Save hours every month managing rent and expenses
• Avoid missed rent payments with automated reminders
• Keep tenant records and lease data organized
• Access your rental data from anywhere, anytime
• Simplify tax season with detailed financial summaries
Whether you're a part-time landlord or a seasoned property investor, LandlordCo is your all-in-one rental property management solution.

Support & Contact:
Need help? Reach us at: Support@morraapps.com
Official Website: https://managelandlords.com
• Privacy Policy: http://managelandlords.com/privacypolicy/
• Terms of Use: http://managelandlords.com/termsofuse/

apps.description:
A clean, modern controller for running engaging workshops and presentations. Build a compelling on‑screen experience by combining your media, timed segments, and music—then project it to an external display with beautifully scaled typography and smooth transitions.
Bring order and energy to any session: welcome your audience, run slideshows, keep segments on time, and set the vibe with Apple Music—directly from your iPhone or iPad.

Key features
1. External display presentation: Automatically renders a polished presentation on an external screen with adaptive layout and crisp typography.

2. Media slideshow: Mix images and videos, highlight the current item, and navigate with play/pause and previous/next controls.

3. Adjustable slideshow timing: Auto‑advance with a customizable interval or take full manual control.

4. Video playback options: Seamless transitions and an optional loop/repeat toggle for continuous playback.

5. Title and welcome message: Set a prominent title and message that sit over your media with excellent readability.

6. Font customization: Choose font family, size scale, weight, and color for both title and message with a live preview.

7. Single timer: Start a focused countdown with quick presets and on‑the‑fly adjustments.

8. Multiple timers: Create and manage several named timers at once, each with clear progress and state.

9. Apple Music integration: Select a playlist, view artwork, and control playback (play/pause, previous/next) from within the app.

10. First‑launch guide: A quick walkthrough to get you presenting fast.

11. Apple Music: Playback requires Apple Music authorization. An active Apple Music subscription may be required for full functionality.

Terms of Use: https://presently.karmaacademy.com.au/terms.html
Privacy Policy: https://presently.karmaacademy.com.au/privacy.html

Discover what users really think about apps before you download, or gain deep insights into your competition. Reviewly combines powerful sentiment analysis with comprehensive market data to help you make informed decisions. Whether you're a consumer looking for the best apps or a business analyzing the competition, Reviewly provides AI-powered insights, detailed review analysis, and market performance metrics all in one intuitive interface. Track unlimited apps, compare competitors, and uncover hidden opportunities with our advanced analytics tools.

Business Users (Competition Analysis)

Market Intelligence Features
- Revenue & Download Analytics: Monthly revenue and download tracking from Sensor Tower data
- Competitive Benchmarking: Compare performance metrics across similar apps
- Market Performance Tracking: Historical data on app performance trends
- Geographic Performance: Top countries analysis and market penetration insights

Competitive Analysis Tools
- Similar Apps Discovery: AI-powered keyword generation to find direct competitors
- Cross-App Comparison: Side-by-side analysis of multiple apps
- Market Share Analysis: Understanding competitive landscape
- Feature Gap Analysis: Identify what competitors offer vs. your app

Business Intelligence
- AI-Powered Review Analysis: Automated insights from competitor reviews
- Opportunity Identification: AI-generated improvement opportunities
- Sentiment Trend Analysis: Track competitor sentiment over time
- Review Volume Monitoring: Track competitor review activity
- Rating Performance Tracking: Monitor competitor rating trends

Advanced Analytics
- Multi-Country Analysis: Compare performance across different App Store regions
- Category Performance: Understand category-specific trends

App Discovery & Reviews

App Discovery Features
- App Store Search Integration: Search and add apps directly from App Store
- Similar Apps Recommendations: Find apps like the ones you're interested in

Review Analysis Tools
- Sentiment Analysis: Quick overview of positive/negative/neutral reviews
- Review Filtering: Filter by rating, sentiment, or date
- Review Search: Find specific topics or issues in reviews
- Review Summaries: AI-generated summaries of review content

User Experience Features
- Quick App Overview: Essential info at a glance 
- Review Reading: Clean, readable review interface
- Review Sorting: Sort by newest, highest rated, or most relevant
- Personal App Library: Save and organize apps you're interested in

Decision Support
- Rating Breakdown: Detailed rating analysis and trends
- Review Volume Analysis: Understand how many people are reviewing
- Price Comparison: Compare free vs. paid app performance

Social Features
- Review Highlights: See the most helpful or recent reviews
- User Feedback Trends: Understand what users are saying about recent updates
- App Store Integration: Direct links to download apps
- Review Notifications: Get notified of new reviews for saved apps
- Community Insights: See what the community thinks about apps



Contact support at support@karmaacademy.com.au

Rock Identifier - Your AI Rock & Mineral Identifier

Discover the fascinating world beneath your feet. Rockly is the ultimate rock identifier that uses cutting-edge AI to instantly identify any specimen from a simple photo. Whether you're a seasoned collector, geology student, or curious explorer, this powerful rock id app transforms your smartphone into a pocket geologist.

FREE FEATURES:
- Rock Tutor AI Chat: Ask Rocky any geology question
- Learn about rock types, minerals, and fossils
- Daily tips and rock facts
- Browse and manage your rock collection
- Rock knowledge library (Mohs scale, crystal systems, rock cycle)
- Measurement tools
- Compare rocks side-by-side

PREMIUM FEATURES (Subscription Required):
- AI Rock Identification from camera photos
- AI Rock Identification from photo gallery
- Unlimited identifications
- Detailed specimen valuations

THE SMARTEST ROCK IDENTIFIER
Point. Snap. Identify. Our advanced AI rock identifier analyzes your specimen and delivers detailed results in seconds—including scientific names, rock types, hardness ratings, crystal systems, and chemical formulas.

MORE THAN JUST A ROCK ID
Rockly works as your all-in-one mineral identifier, crystal identifier, and gem identifier. From common stones to rare crystals, precious gems to everyday minerals, Rockly recognizes them all.

BUILD YOUR DIGITAL COLLECTION
Never forget a find. Store unlimited specimens in your personal collection with photos, notes, and all identification data.

SUBSCRIPTION INFORMATION:
Rockly Premium unlocks all identification features. Subscriptions automatically renew unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. Manage your subscription in your Apple ID account settings.

Terms of Use: https://rockly.karmaacademy.com.au/terms.html

Smart Receipt Scanner and Expense Tracker. Track Reimbursements against your expenses. PDF/CSV/EXCEL export of receipts and expenses. Maintain your receipts across your iPhone and iPads with iCloud sync. Drag and drop images on iPads to quickly create receipts entries. Maintain your Business Travel receipts in different currencies and set exchange rates to later submit your reimbursements. Receiptly is not restricted to only receipts, you can save your vouchers, invoices, or gift cards to keep track of their expiry date.

RECEIPTLY: ALL IN ONE Business and Personal Accounting Solution
Whether you are an individual trying to track home expenses, groceries, and tracking all the home purchases receipts to claim your warranties or person running a small business. This is one app that is made for you. 
Organise your receipts and expenses into Categories. Use tags to quickly filter your related receipts or expenses. Quickly saves a photo of receipt or Invoice on the go while shopping. Customises the details regarding receipts for easy search and tracking. 

App offers widgets to view a quick summary of the store. Medium size widget helps you keep track of top receipts/invoices for selected stores and/or to keep an eye on upcoming warranties of your products. 

Features:
> Smart Scan: Automatically extract the important information from the receipts.
> Quick create: Quickly create using a camera or choose from your photo library. Add existing receipts from the photo library.
> Support for Apple Shortcut automations! Automatically create expenses whenever you make a payment.
> Set home currency for the receipts and have the ability to set the currency for receipt if you are travelling and can set an exchange rate to use for later for reporting.
> Track warranties if products added to the receipts and get notifications. 
> Track Expenses and reimbursements to get a overview of your incoming and outgoing amount.
> Beautiful reports to view your expanses.
> Export: Export your receipts data to CSV, PDF or even Excel(spreadsheet) to share with accountants.
> Widgets: Beautiful widgets to keep an eye on the spending summary on a store or configure the widget to keep track of product warranties.
> Easy Organisation: The app helps you keep your receipts in an organized way for easy search.
> Product Tracking > Keep an eye on the product warranties.
> Tagging: Tag the receipts to search them easily later.

You may purchase an auto-renewing subscription through an In-App Purchase to upgrade to plus and you get
> Unlimited Smart scans: Unlimited smart scans to easily create receipts.
> Export: Export your receipts to share with your tax agents or others.
> App Icons: Choose from different app icons of your liking. 
> Access to the reports for quick summary.

For support and suggestions reach at karm.singh@outlook.com
